full_text:
Sun Sheng (Anguo) 孫盛 (安國)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Sheng (孫盛), styledAnguo (安國). A historian and commentator often referenced by Pei Songzhi. Sun Sheng was an historic figure affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
